# UiResource.MimeType field

The MIME type a UI resource MUST be served with (§26.4). Reproduced verbatim and matched case-sensitively, including the `;profile=mcp-app` profile parameter and the absence of surrounding whitespace; a host advertises this exact string in its `mimeTypes` (§26.2).

```csharp
public const string MimeType;
```
